cases.prompt: 수익 모델 설계해줘. 무료/유료 어떻게 나누고 가격은 어떻게 정하지?

assertions.text: Defines a tier structure (Free/Pro/Team/Enterprise) and free-vs-paid boundary.
Includes Korea-specific considerations (구독 피로, 간편결제, 전자상거래법).

cases.prompt: Help me decide freemium vs subscription and design the pricing tiers.

assertions.text: Compares freemium vs subscription (and other models).
